channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Parking Ticket Machine has been pushed over, 4th June
item.description:
One of the car parking ticket machines outside 2-24 Bexley Road in Erith has been pushed over so it is leaning precariously onto the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 4th June
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Lots of overhanging vegetation, 4th June
item.description:
Lots of overhanging vegetation which is causing difficulty using the alleyway between Edgehill road and Imperial way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22,24, Edgehill Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several trees in Collindale Avenue have a large amount of tree growth at the base of the tree, 4th June
item.description:
The trees in Collindale Avenue need trimming because of new growth around the bases. Some trees down this road are so large they are stopping people walking past safely and a pushchair/wheelchair is inaccessible . Please trim all trees with base growth so the residents can walk safely and use the public pavements.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Collindale Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping where Cobourg Road meets Old Kent Road, 4th June
item.description:
Lots of rubbish has been dumped, including a bedframe, buggy, chairs, clothes and boxes. Please remove asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobourg Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw32yh, 4th June
item.description:
Tree has fallen onto road and onto my carb. Blocking the street !
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s 48, 4th June
item.description:
Wardrobe, mattress and cupboard dumped on pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Princess Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: A large amount of growth around the base of several trees in Gloucester Avenue DA15 7LP -, 4th June
item.description:
The new growth around the base of the trees in Gloucester Avenue are becoming dangerous - some tree growth is stopping people walking on the pavement and using the parking bays - some are sticking out over the road and scratching cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Gloucester Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain. Road flooded outside 64 Broomfield Road, 4th June
item.description:
Blocked drain. Road flooded outside 64 Broomfield Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broomfield Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2ft x 2ft outside number 31 Gloucester Avenue, DA15 7LP - just coming off the drive, 4th June
item.description:
This pothole was repaired by the council a few years ago and has happened again! The pothole causes cars to swerve or otherwise the car wheel smashes down hard and could cause an accident or damage a vehicle..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Gloucester Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Our balcony netting has birds getting trapped inside, 4th June
item.description:
Our balcony netting has eroded in certain areas, pigeons as a result have been flying through and some have got stuck in the netting, 2 have now been caught in the netting and died, they’re still their currently. I called the council on Saturday to report this, as the 2nd bird had became trapped in the morning and neighbours surrounding had noticed and reported it to our flat. Despite me telling whom I spoke with the bird is still alive but really tangled up, I was told it was not an emergency and I should do it myself. There are now 2 birds, dead caught in our balcony netting, it is causing a lot of flys to enter our kitchen when we open the window as they are decaying in the netting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th June
item.description:
Fly tipping outside my house. Also recycling hasn’t been collected for weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dericote Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car - fire hazard, 4th June
item.description:
Adding to previous reports - car been left for 4 days, clearly been in accident. This is a fire hazard to residents, emergency services would not be able to squeeze equipment behind this car to get to entrance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bloomfield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rear Garden of 189 Wendling, off Southampton Road, 4th June
item.description:
Tree is lopsided, dangerous and at risk of falling into neighbouring properties.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping dumped TV etc by bus stop F near 301-320 Amhurst Road please clear., 4th June
item.description:
Fly Tipping dumped TV etc by bus stop F near 301-320 Amhurst Road please clear.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DUMPED BLACK SACKS OF RUBBISH ON PAVEMENT O/S No 21, 4th June
item.description:
Resident reporting there are 4 black sacks of rubbish and some bags full of wood & metal inside as they are open they have been dumped there for one week. Please could someone look into this please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wallace Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken drain an surrounding, 4th June
item.description:
Drain an area around sunken dangerous - just outside the dental practice in road - was reported an poorly repaired - needs to be fixed correctly, its caved in an gets blocked
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 308, Broadway, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins left outside, 4th June
item.description:
The bag and bin has been left outside 7 Hopedale for 3-4 weeks and I do not know who put it there, it doesn’t belong to me. Nobody has claimed it. Please remove. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hopedale Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous sunken manhole cover - reported several time not fixed, 4th June
item.description:
Dangerous sunken manhole cover - reported several time not fixed - dangerous for road users and cyclists cause of danger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upton Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 86 & 88, 4th June
item.description:
Road has a big dip in and cracks on the side where 86 & 88 is and it is just before a bump which is making the road worse to drive on
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Fordwych Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
